"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:59 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem853_verify_after_bem852_tick.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if not missing and ps!='unknown':
    status='route_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='route_fix_dispatch_results_missing'
    next_action='patch codex-runner queue processor/commit path; BEM852/BEM853 null commits imply queue side effects not committed'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='route_fix_runtime_missing'
    next_action='parse dispatch result then patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='route_fix_real_response_missing'
    next_action='patch Claude prompt/provider response writer or dispatch target'
else:
    status='route_unknown_bem853_state'
    next_action='diagnose why BEM853 state not readable'
state={'bem':'BEM-854','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem854_route_after_bem853.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem854_route_after_bem853.md').write_text('# BEM-854 | Route After BEM-853 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-854'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem854_route_after_bem853.json','governance/reports/bem854_route_after_bem853.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-853 proof verification to the next missing-proof repair')
